title: Cohesity IAM Scoper Configuration
description: Schema for cohesity-config.json. Feature-conditional section requirements are enforced by the Python validator, not by this schema.

account_id.description: Customer AWS account ID. Use empty string to fall back to ${AWS::AccountId} at deploy time.

cohesity_account_id.description: Cohesity Cloud Edition account ID. Populates the trust principal in AssumeRolePolicyDocument.

tag_key.description: Tag key used in tag-based IAM conditions.

tag_value.description: Tag value used in StringLike conditions. Must be a literal value — wildcards broaden the match unintentionally.

selected_features.description: Cohesity workflows to include. Drives which IAM permissions and roles are generated.

bucket_pattern.description: Bucket name pattern(s) for all Cohesity-managed S3 buckets. Accepts a glob string or a list of glob strings.

existing_buckets.description: Explicit bucket names to allowlist in place of a pattern. When set, bucket_pattern is ignored.

kms_encryption.description: Whether S3 operations require KMS encryption.

kms_key_arn.description: KMS key ARN to scope S3 KMS operations. Leave empty to allow any key.

vpc_ids.description: VPC IDs to restrict RunInstances, CreateSecurityGroup, and subnet operations.

subnet_ids.description: Subnet IDs to restrict RunInstances and ENI operations.

security_group_ids.description: Security group IDs to restrict AuthorizeSecurityGroup* and CreateSecurityGroup.

use_tagging_conditions.description: Add tag-based conditions to EC2 manage/delete actions. Off by default to avoid breaking pre-existing deployments.

snapshot_prefix.description: Prefix for Cohesity-managed RDS instance snapshots. Scopes snapshot ARNs to snapshot:{prefix}*.

role_name_prefix.description: Prefix for all Cohesity-managed IAM roles. Roles will match arn:aws:iam::*:role/{prefix}*.

use_permissions_boundary.description: Attach and enforce a permissions boundary on all Cohesity-created roles.

permissions_boundary_arn.description: ARN of the IAM policy to use as permissions boundary. Leave empty to auto-generate from account_id and role_name_prefix.

external_id.description: External ID added as sts:ExternalId condition on account-principal AssumeRole statements.

key_arns.description: KMS key ARNs to restrict all KMS operations. Leave empty to allow any key (Resource: "*").

enforce_via_service.description: Enforce kms:ViaService condition to restrict KMS operations to EC2/RDS/S3/DynamoDB/Redshift service integrations.

table_name_pattern.description: DynamoDB table name pattern to restrict data-plane permissions. E.g. 'cohesity-*'. Leave empty for all tables (table/*).

staging_bucket_pattern.description: S3 bucket pattern for DynamoDB export staging. Separate from the general s3.bucket_pattern.

cluster_identifiers.description: Redshift cluster identifiers to restrict GetClusterCredentials and ExecuteStatement resource ARNs.

db_users.description: Redshift database usernames Cohesity will connect as. Scopes dbuser ARNs. Collected but not fully applied.

job_name_prefix.description: Prefix for Cohesity-managed Glue jobs. Scopes StartJobRun/DeleteJob to arn:…:job/{prefix}*.

format.description: Output format. 'cloudformation' generates a full CFT; 'iam-policy' generates a raw IAM policy document.
